title: Fix sync command description
body: As far as I understand, the `sync` command only works at a repository level. It is not able to sync a whole registry, iterating over the catalog.

comments.body: @gbonnefille our repo requires commits to be signed.  You can do so with `git commit --amend -s` and then fetch, rebase and push again.
@gbonnefille are you still working on this?

> @gbonnefille are you still working on this?

Not a lot of time for this currently.
Feel free to fix the documentation in an other PR and close this one.
#1734 is another take on this problem, trying “registry repositories” (and updating all three files).
